hero.heading: Join the Best Swing Trading Institute in Center India
hero.description: Master the stock market with our expert-led stock market classes in Nagpur. Enroll today!

about.heading: About the Institute
about.description: Nishant Mendhe Stock Market Training Institute, based in Center India, Nagpur provides comprehensive stock market training for traders of all experience levels. Our programs are designed to help students understand the financial markets, build strong trading strategies, and gain practical market knowledge. __Through expert-led share market classes, including specialized swing trading sessions, we focus on real-world trading insights and hands-on learning. Our goal is to equip aspiring traders with the confidence, discipline, and skills needed to succeed in the stock market.__Join our trading classes in Nagpur and take the next step toward mastering the markets.

benefits.heading: Benefits We Offer
benefits.description: We provide an immersive trading floor environment that features both advanced online classes and in-person training in small groups. Under the expert guidance of Nishant Mendhe, students gain hands-on experience in trading strategies, risk management, and market analysis, along with 6 months of access to a professional trading setup. If you are seeking practical experience in an authentic trading environment, our institute may be the ideal choice for you.

courses.title: TFC - Trading Fundamentals Course
courses.description: TFC - Trading fundamentals Course : An introduction to the RSI Indicator, focusing on basic support/resistance zones and initial trade setups.
courses.Note: Note : For Recordings of TFC, Please Buy it from Nishant Mendhe.graphy.com
courses.fullDescription: An introduction to the RSI Indicator, focusing on basic support/resistance zones and initial trade setups. This course is perfect for those new to technical trading and want a robust foundation.

curriculum.title: Day 1 : Low-risk and High-reward Trading
curriculum.content:
1. Mind set 
2. candles vs Bar 
3. Rsik Reword Ratio 
4. Succes Ratio

curriculum.title: Day 2 : Trend
curriculum.content:
1. Up Trend 
2. Down And Sideways 
3. minor trend vs major trend

curriculum.title: Day 4 : Low Risk High Reward trading
Day 5 : Inside bar vs Outside Bar
curriculum.content:
1. 4 types of inside bar 
2. 4 types of outside bar

curriculum.title: Day 8 : RSI Indicator
curriculum.content:
Rsi Weekly 40 Support 
 Rsi Monthly 40 Support

curriculum.title: Day 9 : RSI
curriculum.content: RSI Bullish Range Shift with Option

courses.title: ATC - Advannce Technical Master Course
courses.description: Develop a deep understanding of the RSI Indicator, focusing on Divergence, Breakouts, and identifying crucial hidden shifts.
courses.fullDescription: Develop a deep understanding of the RSI Indicator, focusing on Divergence, Breakouts, and identifying crucial hidden shifts. Perfect your market timing and increase profitability with advanced momentum strategies.
courses.Note: Note : For Recordings of ATC, Please Buy it from Nishant Mendhe.graphy.com

faqs.question: What are the prerequisites for joining the stock market classes?
faqs.answer: No prerequisites are necessary. Our classes are designed for all levels, from beginners to experienced traders.

faqs.question: What if I have questions during the course?
faqs.answer: We encourage active participation and engagement. If you have any questions during the course, our instructors are readily available to provide guidance and clarification.

faqs.question: Is prior trading experience required to enroll in stock market course?
faqs.answer: No, our courses cater to individuals with varying levels of experience, including beginners. Whether you have no prior trading knowledge or are an experienced trader looking to refine your skills, our courses are designed to accommodate your needs.

faqs.question: Can I learn at my own pace?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible class schedules, allowing you to learn at your own pace. You can customize your learning journey according to your schedule and preferences.

faqs.question: Are there any prerequisites for the advanced course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the advanced courses are designed for individuals with some prior trading experience.

webinar.heading: Join Nishant Mendhe for Stock Trading Basics
webinar.description: Learn the fundamentals of stock trading and understand how to build a strong foundation in the financial markets with guidance from Nishant Mendhe.
webinar.learningTitle: At this program, you will learn to:
learningPoints: Understand the basics of the stock market and trading concepts
Apply simple, practical, and time-tested trading principles
Develop the right mindset and discipline needed for successful trading
webinar.audienceText: Whether you are a student, working professional, business owner, or a complete beginner, this program helps you gain clear understanding of stock trading from the ground up.
webinar.socialProof: Thousands of learners have already benefited from this training and improved their financial knowledge and trading confidence.
webinar.urgency: Seats are limited!!! Book your seat now.
